description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, featuring a smooth, curved surface for skating and a central rectangular cutout. The ramp is decorated with vibrant blue, purple, and red graffiti-style artwork, including splashes, abstract shapes, and a large black X. Metal safety railings run along the top edges and the stairway, providing protection for users. One side of the ramp has a staircase leading up to the platform, while the opposite side features a prominent peace sign graffiti. The structure is robust and designed for heavy use in urban parks or recreational areas.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with colorful graffiti, metal railings, and a central cutout, designed for skating and urban play.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main skating surface, central cutout, stairway, and tree branch shadow graffiti.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curved ramp interior, blue splash artwork, and the stairway with railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ramp, blue graffiti, and the black X mark near the cutout.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the peace sign graffiti, purple ramp marking, and the stairway side profile.
